{{Quote|I am Doton Het, an entrepreneurial businessman here on Citadel Station. I deal in odds and ends, stuff that Czerka and the Dobo brothers have no interest in.|Doton Het to Meetra Surik|<ref name="TSL" />}}
'''Doton Het''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who won [[Ramana]] from a [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] game from [[Harra (Twi'lek)|Harra]]. Harra had begged for him to give her back and found that the price was 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Eventually Harra would send [[Meetra Surik]] to free Ramana. Doton Het considered it a shame to lose her, as he enjoyed her dancing, thus challenging Surik to a one-on-one duel. When Het lost, Ramana was free to go with Surik.<ref name="TSL" />

Unbeknownst to Surik and The [[Exchange]], Doton Het was selling illegal items to customers without informing the Exchange. Harra however was fully aware of it though and believed that if the Exchange knew it would get Ramana back, as the Exchange would not allow freelancers to cut in on their business, such as slavery and racketeering like in the case of Ramana being forced to perform in the local cantina.<ref name="TSL" />

Doton Het once played a pazaak match against [[Broon Ters]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Very well. I am sad to see her go, but it's true that it is always best to avoid becoming attached to anything, in my line of work.|Doton Het, on selling Ramana to the Jedi Exile|<ref name="TSL" />}}
The following are a list of ways to earn Ramana from Doton Het:
*The first straightforward way is to purchase her for 2,000 credits (If the player has a strong enough persuade skill then they can reduce the price to 1,500).
*Another way is pazaak; the player can wager 1,000 credits and Doton Het can wager Ramana, if the player wins then the player acquires Ramana without paying a single credit.
*A Dark Side option is to tell Harra that you can't convince him and that he would tell the Exile about Doton's business and through the use of [[Luxa]] (before her agreement to kill [[Loppak Slusk]]) could 'persuade' Doton Het to give her up, while the outcome of Ramana can still be light-sided the player will still get Dark Side points as this involves unnecessary violence.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
